title: Find K-th Smallest Pair Distance
titleCn: 找出第 K 小的数对距离

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,1], k = 1 Output: 0 Explanation: Here are all the pairs: (1,3) -> 2 (1,1) -> 0 (3,1) -> 2 Then the 1st smallest distance pair is (1,1), and its distance is 0.
